ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the survey */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "variable_length" INTEGER /* Length of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., numeric, character) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the variable belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type the variable belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the variable belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each length */,
  "length_value" INTEGER /* Value of the length */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the length */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys_variables" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Item number of the variable in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id", "variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_versions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_versions_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_metadata" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_metadata_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_formats" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id", "format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
